era: Indie Rock. E=5 -- melodic, emotionally precise, bittersweet. *Transatlanticism*, *Plans*. Barsuk to Atlantic. Degree 200 milestone. v1.49.341.

location.formative: Capitol Hill indie scene. Late-90s/early-2000s. Barsuk Records ecosystem.
location.career: Death Cab for Cutie. 1997-present. Barsuk to Atlantic. One of the biggest PNW indie bands.

formed: Capitol Hill, Seattle (originally Bellingham, WA -- Western Washington University)

members.name: Ben Gibbard
members.note: Clear, melodic voice. Literary lyrics. Emotional precision. Also The Postal Service.

members.name: Chris Walla
members.note: Atmospheric production. Lush textures. Shaped the band's sonic identity.

associated_musicians.name: The Postal Service
associated_musicians.note: Gibbard + Jimmy Tamborello. Give Up (2003). Electronic pop crossover.

associated_musicians.name: Modest Mouse
associated_musicians.note: Same era. Parallel indie trajectories. Brock/Gibbard as parallel voices.

associated_musicians.name: Pedro the Lion
associated_musicians.note: Same scene. Bazan/Gibbard as parallel storytellers.

theory_nodes.concept: Degree 200 milestone -- more than halfway through the 360-degree arc. Death Cab as the marker: one of the most successful PNW indie bands. A bridge between indie and mainstream.
examples: Death Cab: commercially successful, critically acclaimed.
theory_nodes.description: Degree 200 milestone. Death Cab as marker. Past halfway.

genealogy.relationship: Death Cab at 200. The two hundredth degree.

theory_nodes.concept: Barsuk to Atlantic template -- indie development to major distribution. Same arc as Modest Mouse (Up to Epic). Identity preserved through the transition.
examples: Modest Mouse: Up to Epic (parallel arc).
theory_nodes.description: Barsuk to Atlantic. Indie to major. Template.

genealogy.relationship: Death Cab at 200. The label arc.

theory_nodes.concept: E=5 melodic intensity -- the emotionally resonant middle. Not angular (E=6) or restrained (E=4). Bittersweet precision. Same energy as SDRE but different register.
theory_nodes.description: E=5 melodic intensity. Bittersweet. Resolves from E=6 peak.

genealogy.relationship: Death Cab at 200. E=5 as melodic middle.

cross_references.relationship: FIRST ENTRY! 142 degrees earlier. Second entry covers full rock/indie arc.
E=6 to E=5. Angular to melodic. Both Up-to-major. Brock/Gibbard as parallel voices.
E=4 to E=5. Same scene. Bazan/Gibbard as parallel storytellers.
Both E=5. Emo and indie at same energy. Capitol Hill peers. Aching vs. bittersweet.
